## What does this skill do?

<!-- Required. 1-3 specific sentences. "It helps with docs" is not enough — say exactly what workflow it runs and on what kind of project. -->

## What real problem did it solve?

<!-- Required. Describe the actual situation that prompted this skill. What were you doing, what was tedious or error-prone, and how does this skill improve it? -->

## What did you test it on?

<!-- Required. List the project(s) you ran this skill on before opening this PR. Be specific (e.g. "a FastAPI service with ~30 modules", not "a Python project"). -->

## Skill checklist

- [ ] `SKILL.md` frontmatter has `name` (kebab-case) and `description` (80+ chars)
- [ ] `description` field is specific enough for Claude to trigger without ambiguity
- [ ] "When to Activate" section has concrete, tested trigger phrases
- [ ] All scripts have module-level docstrings
- [ ] No placeholder text (`TODO`, `FIXME`, `coming soon`) anywhere in the skill
- [ ] `README.md` skill registry table is updated

## Breaking changes

<!-- If this modifies an existing skill: list any changes to script interfaces, removed phases, or renamed reference files. Write "None" if this is a new skill. -->
